reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, muy amables, rápida atención. Dispuestos a ayudar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very friendly, and quick to help.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGZ3VEaWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación y el Full, impecables, atención de primera, el motel es excelente, a metros del río colorado, puerta de entrada a la Patagonia, lindo lugar para un descanso en el viaje y una caminara por la orilla del río.

(Translated by Google)
The station and the Full were impeccable, the service was top-notch, the motel was excellent, just meters from the Colorado River, the gateway to Patagonia, a lovely place for a rest during the trip and a walk along the riverbank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGcUtUMmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Más allá de la estación o el Full, el motel del ACA es de primera!, excelente lugar para descansar en un viaje largo. Muy recomendable y de camino a la patagonia en un lugar estratégico.

(Translated by Google)
Beyond the station or the Full service station, the ACA motel is top-notch! An excellent place to rest on a long trip. Highly recommended and strategically located on the way to Patagonia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGeU4tWklBEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo pare a cargar nafta y comer algo. Atención muy amable. Instalaciones en perfecto estado.

(Translated by Google)
I only stopped to refuel and grab a bite to eat. Very friendly service. Facilities in perfect condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGeS1XZ3JRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar. Buena ubicación. Lo único que en mi caso le puedo reclamar es que los precios son un poco excesivos a pesar de ser Socio del A C A.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. Good location. My only complaint is that the prices are a bit high, even though I'm an AC member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGa19lSHZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No hay comidas vegetarianas como ofrecen en todas las full. Pedis alternativas y no te ofrecen nada. No recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
There are no vegetarian meals like they offer at all full-service restaurants. You ask for alternatives, and they don't offer anything. I don't recommend it.
